# Support

- Security issues: see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md). Report privately before public
  disclosure.
- Bugs and feature requests: open an issue with the matching template.
- Circuits and trusted setup: https://github.com/Jatcotcash/jat-circuits
- SDK, relayer, and indexer: https://github.com/Jatcotcash/jat-sdk

This program runs on Solana devnet. Do not use it with real funds.
